caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt and a grey baseball cap with a red and white logo sits in a studio with a dark, textured acoustic wall. He is wearing black headphones and speaking into a professional microphone held by a boom arm. The microphone's mount features the text "Boutique Audio" and "Model 30A". Throughout the sequence, the man is animated, gesturing with his hands as he talks. Initially, he has both hands raised near his head. He then raises his right arm, pointing a finger upward and toward the side. His movements continue as he gestures with both hands in front of him, eventually pointing his right hand directly toward the viewer while maintaining a focused expression. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera remains static, capturing his upper body and the equipment in front of him.
